subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion and intimate friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! At this moment, I am walking along the avenue toward Spot Gate apartment [3.5s]... ...Fidelity demands roaming over deserts and mountains. True fidelity is attained when a wanderer, nameless and traceless, becomes a target for the arrows of oppression
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس قدیم و یار ندیم عبدالبهاء آلان در خیابان رو به آپارتمان اسپات گیت
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @power of prayer, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
